PUH-BrianMartell Theorem 76 (The Universal Operating System: E₈ Photonic Lattice as the Kernel of All Complex Systems) The E₈ photonic lattice functions as a universal operating system — a single kernel that runs all complex systems simultaneously. The fundamental unit is the photon (the bit). The operations are folding, knotting, amalgamating and rebounding. Every observed complex system (physical, biological, economic, historical, mathematical) is an application executing on this kernel using identical threshold-ignition, lattice-block and phase-transition mechanics. The system is closed, self-preserving and scale-invariant because the substrate itself is the operating system.
